summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new Elara AI features: SSE streaming chat, hologram projector, YouTube search & PiP player, and auto-learning knowledge base. All backend APIs (24/24) working perfectly. Frontend UI fully functional with seamless integration. All existing features remain working.
passed_tests: Health endpoint shows new features: streaming, hologram, youtube, auto_learn
SSE streaming chat endpoint returns text/event-stream with word-by-word streaming
Hologram generation API returns JSON with 3D scene elements array
YouTube search API returns video results with ids, titles, channels
Auto-learning feature creates knowledge entries with source 'auto_learned'
Tool mode selector renders with Chat, Holo, YouTube buttons
Chat input placeholder changes based on tool mode (chat/holo/youtube)
SSE streaming chat shows word-by-word typing effect in frontend
Hologram mode switches avatar region to interactive 3D scene projector
YouTube mode displays search results with thumbnails and PiP player
YouTube PiP player opens with iframe and close functionality
Knowledge base shows AUTO and MANUAL badges on entries
Manual knowledge entry via sidebar working
Growth log shows 'learning' entries from auto-learn feature
Auto-learning runs asynchronously after chat conversations
All existing features still work: login, personas, themes, metrics radar
Theme switching between Midnight, Serenity, Cyberpunk, Aurora working
Persona selection (Professional, Casual, Empathetic, etc.) working
Neural metrics radar chart displays correctly
Chat history and clear functionality working
Voice input button accessible
Logout functionality working

success_percentage.backend: 100% (24/24 endpoints working including 6 new feature endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components, new features, and integrations working)
